name: Chimichurri Skirt Steak
tagline: Grilled skirt steak with parsley-oregano chimichurri
highlight: Bright chimichurri carries the steak — no soy, no compromise

hero.alt: Sliced skirt steak with chimichurri on a board
hero.caption: chimichurri steak — green and bright

healthFacts: Skirt is a thin cut — high-heat fast cook only, sliced against the grain.
Parsley + oregano deliver flavonoids and antimicrobial compounds.

steps.title: Make chimichurri
steps.detail: Mince parsley, oregano, garlic by hand (food processor turns it to paste). Stir in vinegar, chili, salt; let stand 10 min, then add olive oil.
steps.tip: Hand-chopped is the way. Best after a 30-min rest.

steps.title: Season and rest steak
steps.detail: Pat steak dry. Salt heavily 15 min before cooking. Heat grill or cast iron blazing hot.
steps.tip: Skirt cooks in 6 minutes total. Have everything ready first.

steps.title: Sear hard, fast
steps.detail: Lay steak on grill or pan. Sear 3 min per side for medium-rare on thick parts (thinner pieces less). Look for deep crust.
steps.tip: Smoke alarm? You're doing it right.

steps.title: Rest, slice, drown
steps.detail: Rest 5 min. Slice thin across the grain. Drown in chimichurri at the table.
steps.tip: Skirt's grain is dramatic — wrong direction = chewy. Look closely.
